name: Red Rose
description: Beautiful red rose perfect for any occasion. Freshly cut and carefully arranged by our expert florists. Each rose is hand-selected for its vibrant color and perfect bloom.

name: White Lily
description: Elegant white lily for special moments. Symbol of purity and beauty, perfect for weddings, anniversaries, or memorial services. Long-lasting blooms with intoxicating fragrance.

name: Pink Peony
description: Gorgeous pink peony for celebrations. Large, lush blooms that make a stunning statement. Perfect for birthdays, graduations, or any special celebration.

name: Yellow Sunflower
description: Bright and cheerful yellow sunflower. Brings sunshine to any room with its large, vibrant blooms. Perfect for lifting spirits and brightening days.

name: Mixed Bouquet
description: Beautiful mixed bouquet featuring a variety of seasonal flowers. Hand-arranged by our expert florists to create a stunning display of colors and textures.

name: Luxury Perfume
description: Premium fragrance for special occasions. Long-lasting scent with notes of jasmine, rose, and sandalwood. Perfect for evening wear and special events.

name: Wedding Bouquet
description: Elegant wedding bouquet designed for your special day. Features premium flowers arranged in a romantic style. Customizable colors and flowers to match your theme.

name: Funeral Wreath
description: Respectful funeral wreath to honor your loved one. Beautifully arranged with white and pastel flowers. Available in various sizes and styles.

name: Birthday Arrangement
description: Colorful birthday arrangement to celebrate another year of life. Bright, cheerful flowers arranged in a festive style. Perfect for any age celebration.

name: Valentine Rose Box
description: Romantic red roses arranged in a beautiful gift box. Perfect for Valentine's Day or any romantic occasion. Includes decorative ribbon and card.
